title: Diasperus johnstonei
taxonomy: Diasperus johnstonei is a genus of flowering plants in the family Proteaceae. The genus Diasperus is endemic to Australia. Diasperus johnstonei is a species of flowering plant that belongs to this genus. It is a part of the family Proteaceae, which includes a diverse group of flowering plants. The classification of Diasperus johnstonei is within the broader context of the plant kingdom, specifically within the division Magnoliophyta.
